name: blocker_rule
value: Report runtime coupling as blocked until hover and cruise acceptance handoffs are ready, powered-source API policies are runtime-ready, gameplay coupling gates are open, and rotor disks remain open rather than solid-filled.
note: Method row for powered-source coupling blocker decomposition.
